changed.summary: Added nodes field to Decision interface to store topology node IDs shaped by each decision
changed.before: Decision interface included decision, alternatives, and rationale fields
structural_changes: modified: Decision interface — added nodes: string[] field

changed.summary: Extended prompt to require decision_trace items include a nodes array linking decisions to topology node IDs
changed.before: Prompt instructed agent to capture decision_trace with decision/alternatives/rationale only
structural_changes: modified: SYSTEM_PROMPT constant — added instruction requiring nodes array in decision_trace entries
modified: SYSTEM_DELTA_SCHEMA.decision_trace.items — added required 'nodes' field (array of strings)

changed.summary: Refactored review layout to render node cards nested under decision headers when nodes arrays present
changed.before: Rendered changes as flat card list followed by separate decisions section with no structural grouping
structural_changes: added: nodeDecisionMap reverse index (nodeId -> decision labels)
added: topoNodeById and diffById lookup maps
modified: main render flow — decision-section blocks with nested node cards when d.nodes present
modified: Changes section — conditionally titled 'Other Changes' for unclaimed nodes
added: node-decision-links UI element for nodes shaped by multiple decisions
removed: escapeHtml function declaration (kept inline as esc)
removed: separate decisions list rendering at bottom

intent: Link decisions to topology nodes via explicit schema field and reorganize review UI to present decisions as primary organizing structure

decision_trace.decision: Bind decisions to topology nodes via explicit nodes array in schema
alternatives: Infer node associations from file paths in diff
Use free-text node references in rationale
decision_trace.rationale: Explicit node IDs enable precise structural organization, validation against topology, and bidirectional navigation between decisions and affected components

decision_trace.decision: Decisions as primary organizing sections in review UI
alternatives: Keep decisions in separate metadata panel at bottom
Inline decisions as tags/badges on node cards
Show decisions in sidebar with click-to-highlight
decision_trace.rationale: Elevating decisions to top-level sections creates narrative flow where architectural choices drive the presentation of code changes, reducing cognitive load and surfacing intent first

decision_trace.decision: Build reverse index nodeDecisionMap to support nodes appearing under multiple decisions
alternatives: Duplicate node cards under each decision
Restrict each node to single decision
Show nodes only once under first decision
decision_trace.rationale: Reverse mapping allows efficient lookup while preserving many-to-many relationship; UI displays primary decision placement with 'Also shaped by' hints for cross-cutting concerns

decision_trace.decision: Partition nodes into decision-driven sections and 'Other Changes' fallback
alternatives: Force all nodes into decisions even for trivial changes
Show all nodes in flat list with decision metadata inline
Hide nodes not linked to decisions
decision_trace.rationale: Unclaimed nodes represent mechanical changes without architectural significance; segregating them preserves clarity of decision narrative while maintaining completeness
